metadata.title: 主われを愛す
metadata.subtitle: Jesus Loves Me, This I Know (Japanese)
metadata.lyricist: Anna B. Warner (1822–1915), translated to Japanese by Julia N. Crosby (1833–1918)
metadata.x_pd_basis: Japanese translation by Julia N. Crosby (d. 1918, > 70 years); original lyrics by Warner (d. 1915) and tune by Bradbury (d. 1868) all > 100 years ago
